query:
INSERT INTO blog_posts (slug, title, excerpt, content, featuredImageUrl, category, tags, authorName, readingTime, status, publishedAt, viewCount, likeCount) VALUES
('sustainable-fashion-guide-2026', 'The Ultimate Guide to Sustainable Fashion in 2026', 'Everything you need to know about building an eco-conscious wardrobe without sacrificing style.', '## Why Sustainable Fashion Matters

The fashion industry is one of the largest polluters on the planet. But here''s the good news: you can look amazing while making a difference. 🌱

### The Problem with Fast Fashion

Every year, millions of tons of clothing end up in landfills. The average garment is worn only 7 times before being discarded. That''s not just wasteful—it''s a crisis.

### How Secondhand Shopping Helps

When you buy pre-loved clothing, you''re:
- **Reducing textile waste** by keeping clothes out of landfills
- **Lowering carbon emissions** from new production
- **Supporting local communities** through thrift store partnerships
- **Finding unique pieces** that nobody else has

### Building Your Sustainable Wardrobe

Start with the basics:
1. **Invest in quality over quantity** - One well-made jacket beats five cheap ones
2. **Choose timeless styles** - Classic pieces never go out of fashion
3. **Learn basic repairs** - A loose button doesn''t mean the end
4. **Shop secondhand first** - You''d be surprised what you can find

> "The most sustainable garment is the one already in your closet—or someone else''s." — Urban Refit Team

### The Urban Refit Difference

We curate the best pre-loved pieces so you don''t have to dig through endless racks. Every item is inspected, cleaned, and ready to wear. Plus, 10% of every sale goes back to our thrift store partners.

Ready to make a change? [Shop our collection](/shop) and join the sustainable fashion movement. 💚', '/blog/sustainable-fashion.png', 'sustainability', '["sustainable", "eco-friendly", "guide", "tips"]', 'Urban Refit Team', 6, 'published', NOW(), 234, 45),

('thrift-store-styling-secrets', '5 Styling Secrets from Pro Thrift Shoppers', 'Learn how the pros find hidden gems and style them like runway looks.', '## The Art of Thrift Shopping

Thrift shopping isn''t just about saving money—it''s about the thrill of the hunt. Here are the secrets that seasoned thrifters swear by. ✨

### 1. Know Your Measurements

This is non-negotiable. Vintage sizing is all over the place, so forget the number on the tag. What matters is:
- Shoulder width
- Chest/bust measurement
- Waist and hip measurements
- Inseam for pants

Pro tip: Keep these measurements in your phone notes for quick reference.

### 2. Feel the Fabric First

Before you even look at the style, touch the fabric. Quality materials feel different:
- **Silk** has a cool, smooth texture
- **Wool** feels substantial and warm
- **Cotton** should feel crisp, not thin
- **Linen** has a natural texture

### 3. Check the Details

The devil is in the details. Look for:
- Real buttons (not plastic)
- Quality zippers (YKK is a good sign)
- Finished seams inside
- Pattern matching at seams

### 4. Think Beyond the Original Purpose

That oversized men''s blazer? Perfect for a feminine power look. Those high-waisted trousers? Crop them for a modern vibe. Get creative!

### 5. Build Outfit Formulas

Create go-to combinations that work:
- Vintage tee + high-waisted jeans + blazer
- Slip dress + oversized cardigan + boots
- Button-down + wide-leg pants + sneakers

### Your Turn

Ready to put these tips into practice? Browse our [curated collection](/shop) of pre-loved pieces, each one hand-selected for quality and style.

Happy hunting! 🛍️', '/blog/thrift-styling-tips.png', 'style_tips', '["styling", "thrift", "tips", "fashion"]', 'Urban Refit Team', 5, 'published', NOW() - INTERVAL 2 DAY, 189, 38),

('brand-spotlight-levis-501', 'Brand Spotlight: The Timeless Appeal of Levi''s 501', 'Why these iconic jeans have remained a wardrobe staple for over 150 years.', '## A Legend in Denim

Since 1873, Levi''s 501 jeans have been the gold standard of denim. But what makes them so special? Let''s dive in. 👖

### The History

The 501 was the original blue jean—invented by Levi Strauss and Jacob Davis for California gold miners who needed durable workwear. Those copper rivets? They were patented to reinforce stress points.

### Why Vintage 501s Are Special

Modern 501s are great, but vintage pairs have something extra:
- **Selvedge denim** - Woven on old shuttle looms for a tighter weave
- **Natural fading** - Years of wear create unique patterns
- **Made in USA** - Pre-1980s pairs were all American-made
- **Character** - Each pair tells a story

### How to Identify Quality Vintage Levi''s

Look for these markers:
- **Red tab** - "LEVI''S" in all caps indicates pre-1971
- **Big E** - Capital E on the tab means it''s from the 60s or earlier
- **Care tag** - Pre-1971 pairs don''t have care instructions
- **Selvedge edge** - Check the outseam for the white and red edge

### Styling Your 501s

The beauty of 501s is their versatility:
- **Casual**: White tee, sneakers, done
- **Smart casual**: Tucked button-down, loafers
- **Elevated**: Blazer, heels, statement jewelry

### Find Your Perfect Pair

We regularly stock vintage and pre-loved Levi''s in various washes and sizes. [Check our current selection](/shop/jeans) and find your forever jeans.

*Because some things never go out of style.* 💙', '/blog/brand-spotlight-levis.png', 'brand_spotlight', '["levis", "denim", "vintage", "brand"]', 'Urban Refit Team', 7, 'published', NOW() - INTERVAL 5 DAY, 312, 67),

('meet-our-thrift-store-partners', 'Meet the Thrift Stores Behind Urban Refit', 'Get to know the local heroes who make sustainable fashion possible.', '## The Heart of Our Mission

Behind every piece on Urban Refit is a local thrift store working to make a difference in their community. Here''s a look at some of our amazing partners. 🏪

### Community Threads - Downtown

Run by Maria and her team of dedicated volunteers, Community Threads has been serving the neighborhood for over 15 years. All proceeds support local homeless shelters.

> "Working with Urban Refit has allowed us to reach customers we never could before. It''s a win-win." — Maria, Founder

### Second Chance Boutique - Eastside

What started as a small church basement operation has grown into a beloved community hub. They specialize in vintage designer finds and have an incredible eye for quality.

### Green Closet Collective - Westside

A newer addition to our partner family, Green Closet is run by a group of environmental activists who believe in fashion as a form of protest against waste.

### How Our Partnership Works

1. We visit partner stores weekly to curate selections
2. Items are cleaned, photographed, and listed
3. When you buy, 10% goes directly back to the store
4. Unsold items are returned or donated

### Why This Matters

Every purchase you make:
- Supports local nonprofits
- Keeps clothes out of landfills
- Creates jobs in your community
- Funds charitable programs

### Visit Our Partners

Want to shop in person? [Find a partner store near you](/partners) and experience the magic of thrifting firsthand.

*Together, we''re building a more sustainable future—one outfit at a time.* 💚', '/blog/community-thrift.png', 'community', '["community", "partners", "thrift-stores", "impact"]', 'Urban Refit Team', 4, 'published', NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY, 156, 29),

('fashion-trends-2026-secondhand', '2026 Fashion Trends You Can Find Secondhand', 'The hottest looks of the year—and how to score them sustainably.', '## Trend Alert: Sustainable Edition

Good news: this year''s biggest trends are totally achievable through secondhand shopping. Here''s what to look for. 🔥

### 1. Quiet Luxury

The "stealth wealth" aesthetic is huge. Think:
- Cashmere sweaters in neutral tones
- Well-tailored blazers
- Quality leather accessories
- Minimal logos

**Where to find it**: Look for brands like Ralph Lauren, Brooks Brothers, and J.Crew in our collection.

### 2. Wide-Leg Everything

From trousers to jeans, the wider the better. The 90s are back, baby.

**Pro tip**: Vintage high-waisted pants often have better construction than modern fast-fashion versions.

### 3. Burgundy & Chocolate

Rich, warm tones are dominating. These colors look expensive and pair with everything.

**Secondhand advantage**: Vintage pieces in these classic colors are everywhere!

### 4. Oversized Outerwear

Big coats, roomy blazers, chunky knits. Comfort meets style.

**What to look for**: Men''s sections often have the best oversized pieces.

### 5. Vintage Band Tees

Authentic vintage concert tees are the ultimate flex. Just make sure they''re real—check for single-stitch hems and soft, worn cotton.

### Shop the Trends

We''ve curated a [Trending Now](/shop) section featuring pieces that hit all these marks. New items added weekly!

*Stay ahead of the curve—sustainably.* ✨', '/blog/trends-2026.png', 'trends', '["trends", "2026", "fashion", "style"]', 'Urban Refit Team', 5, 'published', NOW() - INTERVAL 3 DAY, 278, 52);
